title: Post-028 Public Mutation-Seam Deployment Boundary Decision
objective: Decide the smallest truthful next slice after Packet 028 now that the promoted public host serves the remediated static assets but the PM mutation-seam routes are still absent from all public hosts.
decision_rationale: Packet 028 succeeded in promoting the new operations-web build to production and proved that the affected PM and approval surfaces now request same-origin `/api/v1` instead of `localhost`.
Those same-origin requests still return `404` on `https://operations.apexpowerops.com`, so the remaining blocker is no longer the public static bundle.

A control check against `https://control.apexpowerops.com/api/v1/reads/approval-queue` and `/api/v1/schedule/projects` also returns `Not Found`, so a simple rewrite to the existing public control-plane host would not satisfy the PM mutation-seam contract.

`apps/operations-web` currently has no rewrite or proxy contract for `/api/v1/{reads,schedule,mutations}`, and the repo surfaces reviewed in this slice do not define any existing public mutation-seam host, ingress, or deployment workflow.

The smallest truthful next slice is therefore planning, not further runtime poking: define the exact public deployment or ingress contract for the mutation-seam routes that the remediated public PM and lead surfaces now correctly call.

decision_evidence.operations_web_proxy_contract: no rewrite or proxy contract found in apps/operations-web next.config or adjacent deploy config

next_packet_candidate: Olares Dev Residency 030 - Bounded Public Mutation-Seam Deployment Or Ingress Planning
closure_note: Executed 2026-05-05 as a decision-only packet. Packet 029 closes the post-028 boundary by naming the real remaining blocker: no public mutation-seam deployment or ingress contract exists for the PM `reads`, `schedule`, and `mutations` routes that the promoted public surfaces now correctly target.
next_action: Execute Packet 030 as bounded public mutation-seam deployment or ingress planning only.
